headline: Paramount Skydance (PSKY) Stock Looks Undervalued Following Fresh Merger Delay Risks
summary: Paramount Skydance stock is coming off a steep slide over the past five years, yet on Simply Wall St’s checks it still screens as attractively priced. This puts the recent drawdown and the current valuation signals in clear tension for investors trying to judge what is already reflected in the share price. Over the past 5 years, Paramount Skydance has fallen about 74%, which shows how much long term shareholders have already seen priced out of the stock. The proposed US$110b acquisition of...
